2026-04-27T15:32:36.6124219Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-27T15:32:36.6124781Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-27T15:32:36.6125212Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-27T15:32:36.6125597Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-27T15:32:36.6125911Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-27T15:32:36.6126150Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-27T15:32:36.6126307Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-27T15:32:36.6126492Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-27T15:32:36.6127345Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-27T15:32:36.6127854Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-27T15:32:36.6128115Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-27T15:33:47.2422296Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-27T15:33:31.89839317Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":"58709","method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-27T15:33:47.2437419Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-27T15:33:32.192676489Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58709,\"title\":\"MPG emitter: OperationStatusResultOperationSource calls inaccessible Deserialize on cross-assembly common type\",\"body\":\"## Summary\\n\\nFor long-running operations whose response shape is the cross-assembly common type `Azure.ResourceManager.Models.OperationStatusResult`, the MPG emitter generates an `IOperationSource` implementation that calls a non-public static factory method that doesn\\u0026#39;t exist on the consuming side.\\n\\n## Repro\\n\\nAny RP that has an LRO returning `OperationStatusResult` (e.g. `Azure.ResourceManager.Redis`).\\n\\nAfter regen, `src/Generated/LongRunningOperation/OperationStatusResultOperationSource.cs` contains:\\n\\n```csharp\\nOperationStatusResult IOperationSource.CreateResult(Response response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)\\n{\\n    using JsonDocument document = JsonDocument.Parse(response.ContentStream);\\n    OperationStatusResult result = OperationStatusResult.DeserializeOperationStatusResult(\\n        document.RootElement, ModelSerializationExtensions.WireOptions);\\n    return result;\\n}\\n```\\n\\nBuild fails:\\n\\n\\u0026gt; CS0117: \\u0026#39;OperationStatusResult\\u0026#39; does not contain a definition for \\u0026#39;DeserializeOperationStatusResult\\u0026#39;\\n\\nRoot cause: `OperationStatusResult` lives in `Azure.ResourceManager` (`Azure.ResourceManager.Models`); its `DeserializeOperationStatusResult` factory is `internal` to that assembly, so consumer SDKs cannot call it. Only the public `IPersistableModel` / `IJsonModel` interfaces are accessible.\\n\\n## Expected\\n\\nFor cross-assembly common types, the emitter should use `ModelReaderWriter.Read(...)` with the SDK\\u0026#39;s generated `ModelReaderWriterContext` instead of the inaccessible static factory. The legacy `autorest.csharp` generator did this correctly:\\n\\n```csharp\\nreturn ModelReaderWriter.Read(\\n    new BinaryData(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(document.RootElement.GetRawText())),\\n    ModelSerializationExtensions.WireOptions,\\n    AzureResourceManagerContext.Default);\\n```\\n\\n(See e.g. `sdk/workloads/Azure.ResourceManager.Workloads/src/Generated/LongRunningOperation/OperationStatusResultOperationSource.cs` and `sdk/migrationdiscoverysap/Azure.ResourceManager.MigrationDiscoverySap/src/Generated/LongRunningOperation/OperationStatusResultOperationSource.cs` - both autorest.csharp-generated, both correct.)\\n\\n## Workaround\\n\\nEach affected SDK ships a hand-rolled `Custom/LongRunningOperation/OperationStatusResultOperationSource.cs` with the `ModelReaderWriter.Read` form. Regen produces an empty `partial` in `Generated/` and the customization supplies the actual interface implementation.\\n\\n## Affected SDKs (already shipping the workaround)\\n\\n- `sdk/redis/Azure.ResourceManager.Redis` (PR #56877, this migration)\\n- `sdk/workloadssapvirtualinstance/Azure.ResourceManager.WorkloadsSapVirtualInstance`\\n- `sdk/azurelargeinstance/Azure.ResourceManager.LargeInstance`\\n- `sdk/computelimit/Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit`\\n\\nFixing this generator-side would let all four SDKs delete their `Custom/LongRunningOperation/OperationStatusResultOperationSource.cs` file, and unblock new MPG migrations that involve LROs returning `OperationStatusResult`.\\n\\n## Context\\n\\nEmitter version: `@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt@1.0.0-alpha.20260423.3`.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58709\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"haiyuazhang\",\"id\":1924967,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/haiyuazhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1924967?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-27T15:30:59Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-27T15:32:05Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
2026-04-27T15:33:47.2452578Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-27T15:33:32.205452128Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":58709,"method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-27T15:33:47.2467632Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-27T15:33:32.426714545Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58709,\"title\":\"MPG emitter: OperationStatusResultOperationSource calls inaccessible Deserialize on cross-assembly common type\",\"body\":\"## Summary\\n\\nFor long-running operations whose response shape is the cross-assembly common type `Azure.ResourceManager.Models.OperationStatusResult`, the MPG emitter generates an `IOperationSource` implementation that calls a non-public static factory method that doesn\\u0026#39;t exist on the consuming side.\\n\\n## Repro\\n\\nAny RP that has an LRO returning `OperationStatusResult` (e.g. `Azure.ResourceManager.Redis`).\\n\\nAfter regen, `src/Generated/LongRunningOperation/OperationStatusResultOperationSource.cs` contains:\\n\\n```csharp\\nOperationStatusResult IOperationSource.CreateResult(Response response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)\\n{\\n    using JsonDocument document = JsonDocument.Parse(response.ContentStream);\\n    OperationStatusResult result = OperationStatusResult.DeserializeOperationStatusResult(\\n        document.RootElement, ModelSerializationExtensions.WireOptions);\\n    return result;\\n}\\n```\\n\\nBuild fails:\\n\\n\\u0026gt; CS0117: \\u0026#39;OperationStatusResult\\u0026#39; does not contain a definition for \\u0026#39;DeserializeOperationStatusResult\\u0026#39;\\n\\nRoot cause: `OperationStatusResult` lives in `Azure.ResourceManager` (`Azure.ResourceManager.Models`); its `DeserializeOperationStatusResult` factory is `internal` to that assembly, so consumer SDKs cannot call it. Only the public `IPersistableModel` / `IJsonModel` interfaces are accessible.\\n\\n## Expected\\n\\nFor cross-assembly common types, the emitter should use `ModelReaderWriter.Read(...)` with the SDK\\u0026#39;s generated `ModelReaderWriterContext` instead of the inaccessible static factory. The legacy `autorest.csharp` generator did this correctly:\\n\\n```csharp\\nreturn ModelReaderWriter.Read(\\n    new BinaryData(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(document.RootElement.GetRawText())),\\n    ModelSerializationExtensions.WireOptions,\\n    AzureResourceManagerContext.Default);\\n```\\n\\n(See e.g. `sdk/workloads/Azure.ResourceManager.Workloads/src/Generated/LongRunningOperation/OperationStatusResultOperationSource.cs` and `sdk/migrationdiscoverysap/Azure.ResourceManager.MigrationDiscoverySap/src/Generated/LongRunningOperation/OperationStatusResultOperationSource.cs` - both autorest.csharp-generated, both correct.)\\n\\n## Workaround\\n\\nEach affected SDK ships a hand-rolled `Custom/LongRunningOperation/OperationStatusResultOperationSource.cs` with the `ModelReaderWriter.Read` form. Regen produces an empty `partial` in `Generated/` and the customization supplies the actual interface implementation.\\n\\n## Affected SDKs (already shipping the workaround)\\n\\n- `sdk/redis/Azure.ResourceManager.Redis` (PR #56877, this migration)\\n- `sdk/workloadssapvirtualinstance/Azure.ResourceManager.WorkloadsSapVirtualInstance`\\n- `sdk/azurelargeinstance/Azure.ResourceManager.LargeInstance`\\n- `sdk/computelimit/Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit`\\n\\nFixing this generator-side would let all four SDKs delete their `Custom/LongRunningOperation/OperationStatusResultOperationSource.cs` file, and unblock new MPG migrations that involve LROs returning `OperationStatusResult`.\\n\\n## Context\\n\\nEmitter version: `@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt@1.0.0-alpha.20260423.3`.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58709\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"haiyuazhang\",\"id\":1924967,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/haiyuazhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1924967?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-27T15:30:59Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-27T15:32:05Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
